text.title: Exploratory Charter Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to run a single exploratory testing session end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: draft-charter
step.input: Feature spec, risk matrix entry, automated-test coverage.
step.action: Write a single mission sentence; pick 3-5 focus areas; pick a time-box (60/75/90/120); list 1+ heuristics.
step.decision-gate: Reject when mission is multi-objective or focus_areas exceeds 5.

step.name: prep-environment
step.action: Verify the build is green; load seed data; close other tabs; start the timer.
step.decision-gate: Halt when the build is broken — skip this methodology until the build is fixed.

step.name: run-session
step.action: Generate test ideas in the moment; log every idea, observation, question, and bug with a timestamp; stop at the time-box.
step.decision-gate: Reject when log degrades in the last quarter (cognitive fatigue); end the session at the time-box anyway.

step.name: debrief
step.action: Within 24 hours: write 3-5 key findings (themes, not just bugs), list bugs filed with severity, list follow-ups and debt items, record actual_time_minutes.
step.decision-gate: Reject when key_findings is just a bug list — re-synthesise themes.

step.name: publish-and-index
step.action: Post the debrief to the team channel; index in the QA wiki; run the validator script.
step.decision-gate: Block index when the validator returns violations.
